name: high-impact-misinfo-monitor
description: Continuous monitoring of high-profile actors and news outlets to detect malicious demagoguery and high-impact lies.

steps.name: ingest-feeds
steps.prompt_template: Monitor the following list of high-profile social media accounts and news RSS feeds for new statements: {{input}}. Extract all factual claims made in the last 24 hours with author, reach estimate, and platform.

steps.name: translate-claims
steps.prompt_template: Translate all non-English claims in {{extracted_claims}} to English. Preserve original language text. Source languages: SK, CZ, HU, RU.

steps.name: identify-demagoguery
steps.prompt_template: Review the following claims: {{translated_claims}}. Identify statements that exhibit demagoguery (appealing to prejudices, using inflammatory language) or contain potentially high-impact malicious lies that could cause public harm or misinformation spread. Include a brief reasoning chain for each flag.

steps.name: impact-scoring
steps.prompt_template: For each flagged claim in {{flagged_claims}}, assign an impact score (0-100) based on the reach of the author, platform virality potential, and the potential for social disruption in the Slovak/Central European context. Filter for claims with a score > 75 and output them as a structured JSON list with fields: claim_text, author, source_url, impact_score, flag_reason.

steps.name: qa-review
steps.prompt_template: Review the scored claims {{scored_claims}} for scoring consistency, evidence quality, and flag accuracy. Verify that high-impact_score claims (>75) genuinely warrant escalation in the Slovak/Central European context. Correct or remove any mis-scored claims.
